reasoning: Oxybenzone (2-hydroxy-4-methoxybenzophenone) is a benzophenone derivative with a hydroxyl and methoxy substituted aromatic system. It is classified under benzophenones, which are diaryl ketones, fitting within the phenylpropanoids/polyketides branch as a flavonoid-related compound (benzophenone scaffold is closely related to chalcones/flavonoids).
